product_overview: A comprehensive web application designed to manage karate schools efficiently, offering family-oriented registration, class and program management, attendance tracking, payment processing, communication tools, marketing features, and robust administrative controls.
core_goals: Provide an intuitive family portal for student enrollment, profile management, payments, and communication.
Enable administrators to manage families, programs, payments, attendance, and discounts with ease and efficiency.
Deliver instructors dedicated tools for session management, attendance tracking, and student monitoring suited for tablet and desktop.
Ensure secure, PCI-compliant payment processing with integrated Stripe and Square providers plus tax and invoice management.
Support marketing needs with dynamic landing pages, SEO optimization, and custom URL building for programs.
Offer robust security through CSRF protection, strict Content Security Policy, and role-based access control.
Enable scalable real-time communication via messaging and push notifications.
Provide offline support and PWA capabilities for enhanced user experience across devices.
Integrate AI-powered database chat for efficient bulk data operations and queries.
key_features: Authentication & Role-based Access Control for Admins, Instructors, and Families.
Family Profile & Guardian Management with multi-student support.
Student Management with enrollment, belt progression, and attendance reporting.
Event Creation, Management, and Registration including digital waivers with PDF generation.
Multi-provider Payment Processing integrating Stripe and Square with tax calculations and webhooks.
Invoice Management featuring templates, line items, PDF generation, and payment history tracking.
Enrollment Management linking students to programs and classes with payment tracking.
Digital Attendance System with recording, reporting, and late detection for instructors.
Two-way Messaging for families, admins, and instructors with conversation threading.
Calendar & Scheduling with grid/list views, filters, and session management.
Program and Class Management tailored for martial arts school workflows.
Discount System with templates, codes, and automatic family discounts.
E-commerce Store with product, variant, inventory, and order management.
Web Push Notifications for real-time updates and subscription management.
Progressive Web App support with service workers, offline capabilities, and install prompts.
Dark/Light Theme Support plus UI components using Shadcn/UI.
Monetary System using integer-based storage with dinero.js ensuring precision and performance.
Security Features including CSRF protection, CSP enforcement, JWT authentication, and data protection policies.
AI Integration with Google Gemini API enabling natural language database chat.
Bulk Operations and administrative tools optimized for large datasets management.
Dynamic Marketing Tools with SEO, customizable program landing pages, and URL builder.
user_flow_summary: User registration and login with role-based access directing to appropriate dashboards (Family, Instructor, Admin).
Families manage profiles, add guardians, enroll students in classes or events, sign waivers digitally, and make payments securely.
Event registration follows a three-step flow: student selection, waiver signing (if required), and final registration with payment.
Administrators create and manage families, programs, classes, events, discounts, and oversee payments and attendance.
Admins use AI database chat for natural language queries to perform bulk operations and gain insights from student and payment data.
Admins manage calendar events, monitor push notification diagnostics, and configure system settings through dedicated admin tools.
Admins track student belt progression by creating and managing belt awards linked to student profiles.
Instructors access their portal to view sessions, mark attendance using tablet-friendly interfaces, communicate with families, and track student eligibility and progress.
Users interact with messaging systems to communicate internally with administrators or instructors through threaded conversations.
Families browse and purchase items from the online store, manage orders, and receive notifications on purchases and events.
Notification subscriptions manage push notifications settings enabling real-time alerts for important updates.
Marketing teams or admins generate and customize landing pages and URLs for promotions with SEO support including sitemap generation.
System monitors actions with security controls enforcing CSRF protection, authentication tokens, and role permissions.
Payments are processed through integrated Stripe and Square systems with invoice tracking, eligibility checking, and tax calculations.
Pending payments are tracked and managed separately, allowing admins to monitor outstanding balances and payment due dates.
validation_criteria: Successful user authentication and role-based access control functioning as intended across user types (admin, instructor, family).
Login functionality works correctly with proper session management and token refresh handling.
End-to-end family management workflow from creation to enrollment and payment is seamless and error-free.
Guardian management allows adding, editing, and removing guardians with proper family associations.
Student profile management including belt progression tracking and belt award creation functions correctly.
Digital waiver signing and PDF generation are completed correctly with appropriate storage and retrieval.
Event registration flow (student selection → waiver signing → registration) works seamlessly with proper validation.
Payment processing works reliably with Stripe and Square, including webhook event handling and tax application.
Payment eligibility checking and paid-until date calculation function correctly based on business rules.
Pending payment tracking and management in admin portal displays accurate information.
Invoices are generated correctly with line items and payment histories tracked and displayed accurately.
Attendance tracking captures session attendance and late arrivals with correct reporting in instructor and admin portals.
Messaging system enables realtime two-way communications without loss or corruption of messages.
Event and calendar views accurately reflect scheduled programs, sessions, and registrations with correct filtering.
Admin calendar management allows creating and editing calendar events with proper date handling.
Discount codes and automatic discounts apply properly during enrollment and checkout processes.
Store functions support inventory tracking and order management including variant handling and ordering workflows.
Push notifications deliver timely updates respecting user subscriptions and preferences.
Push notification diagnostics tools provide accurate troubleshooting information for admins.
PWA features provide offline usage, service worker registration, and installation prompts as expected.
Security features including CSRF tokens, strict CSP policies with nonce, JWT authentication, and RLS policies are enforced.
AI database chat effectively processes natural language queries and returns accurate dataset manipulations and insights.
Database schema retrieval and caching for AI chat works efficiently without performance degradation.
SEO sitemap generation produces valid XML with accurate URLs and proper update frequencies.
Program introduction pages and onboarding flow guide new users through registration smoothly.
Belt award management allows admins to track and update student belt progression accurately.
User interface responds correctly to theme changes and displays modern accessible components consistently.
System logging and error monitoring with Sentry capture and alert on critical failures or unexpected behaviors.
